title: Improving Task Automation with Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: davidmiller (David Millar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been using Monday.com to manage my team’s projects, and I’m interested in exploring advanced task automation to streamline our workflow. What are some of the best practices or tips you’ve found for setting up effective automations? Additionally, are there any lesser-known features or integrations that can enhance automation on Monday.com?

Thanks in advance for your insights!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey David

I’ll set up advanced task automation to streamline your workflow effectively. We’ll utilize custom automations to trigger actions based on task updates, due dates, and dependencies. Integrating third-party tools like Zapier or Integromat can further enhance capabilities by connecting Monday.com with other platforms you use.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David,
How many automations are you dealing with on an average?
I have found that making sure things are kept neat and clean (in terms of the automations) helps greatly as the number of automations grows.
